name: Expansion Personal Storage
description: Per-player private storage system at defined locations. Players deposit and retrieve items only visible to them.
overview:
The Personal Storage system works **outside and separately** from the normal DayZ container/cargo system. It allows server owners to create storage points at defined positions where players can deposit and retrieve items that are **only visible to the owning player**.

Deposited items can only be retrieved at the same storage where they were deposited, unless the storage is configured as global.

## Key Features

- **Private Storage** — Items are only visible to the player who deposited them
- **Category Sorting** — Configure menu categories to organize stored items
- **Storage Case Support** — Optional personal storage case system
- **Item Exclusions** — Prevent specific items from being deposited
- **Per-Storage Item Limits** — Control how many items each storage point can hold
installation: Ensure Expansion Core is installed and loaded.
Add @ExpansionPersonalStorage to your -mod= parameter after Core.
Start the server to generate PersonalStorageSettings.json.
Configure storage NPC positions and item limits.

troubleshooting.solution: Verify the storage trader configuration file has correct coordinates and is valid JSON.
Check ExcludedClassNames to ensure the item class isn't blocked. Verify MaxItemsPerStorage hasn't been reached.

useCases.title: Safe Item Banking
useCases.description: Provide players with a secure way to store valuable items without risk of raiding.

useCases.title: Trader Area Storage
useCases.description: Place personal storage NPCs near trader zones so players can stash items while trading.

quickSettings.name: Enabled
quickSettings.description: Enable or disable the personal storage system.

quickSettings.name: UsePersonalStorageCase
quickSettings.description: Enable the personal storage case system as an alternative access method.

quickSettings.name: MaxItemsPerStorage
quickSettings.description: Maximum items per storage a player can deposit. Only counts main items, not their attachments or cargo.

_blockData.content:
The Personal Storage system works **outside and separately** from the normal DayZ container/cargo system. It allows server owners to create storage points at defined positions where players can deposit and retrieve items that are **only visible to the owning player**.

Deposited items can only be retrieved at the same storage where they were deposited, unless the storage is configured as global.

## Key Features

- **Private Storage** — Items are only visible to the player who deposited them
- **Category Sorting** — Configure menu categories to organize stored items
- **Storage Case Support** — Optional personal storage case system
- **Item Exclusions** — Prevent specific items from being deposited
- **Per-Storage Item Limits** — Control how many items each storage point can hold

steps: Ensure Expansion Core is installed and loaded.
Add @ExpansionPersonalStorage to your -mod= parameter after Core.
Start the server to generate PersonalStorageSettings.json.
Configure storage NPC positions and item limits.

useCases.title: Storage NPC not appearing
useCases.description: Verify the storage trader configuration file has correct coordinates and is valid JSON.

useCases.title: Items not depositable
useCases.description: Check ExcludedClassNames to ensure the item class isn't blocked. Verify MaxItemsPerStorage hasn't been reached.
